title: Create scoping tasks for Autonomy Phases 3-5 (design)
description:
## Source
Council review at `Data/Pages/council/blueprint-yaml-autonomy-council-2026-06-29.md` — Moderate concern M2

## Background
The autonomy design defines 5 phases, but only Phases 0-2 have tasks (TSK-0238, TSK-0239, TSK-0240). Phases 3 (chaining/branching), 4 (persistence), and 5 (dashboard) have no tasks or scope management.

## Scope
Create Backlog design tasks for:

### Phase 3 — Chaining and Branching (Future)
- `TaskSequenceGoal` enhancement or companion continuation goal
- Support for "do X, then ask whether to do Y"
- Branch decisions based on ActionOutcome
- Partial-result chaining
- Chain depth limit enforcement

### Phase 4 — Persistence and Restart Resilience (Future)
- Optional scheduled wake store
- Wake replay on startup
- Stale wake cleanup
- Expiry semantics
- Metrics for missed wakes

### Phase 5 — Dashboard and Operator Controls (Future)
- Pending wakes list display
- Follow-up policy display
- Manual wake trigger
- Cancel wake
- "Pause autonomy" toggle (already promoted to TSK-0248)
- Reason for last suppressed wake

## Exit Criteria
- Tasks created with type:design labels
- Each task references the relevant section from the design doc
- Priority and sprint assignment documented (all Future/Deferred)
